KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_PERMANENT_COMPONE: Instance changes made by processing remain on this card.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_DISPOSABLE_COMPON: Exhaust this after it is played by a machine.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_FRAGILE_COMPONENT: The first process succeeds; it breaks before a second process.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_PRECISION_COMPONE: When used as the fusion body, the material's Cost is not added.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_PROCEDURE.title: Procedure
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_PROCEDURE.descrip: Processes components or operates factory systems.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_MATERIAL.title: Material
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_MATERIAL.descript: Can be produced and consumed by processing or machine effects.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_WASTE.title: Scrap
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_WASTE.description: Clogs your Hand and can be handled by decomposer effects.
KILLER_FACTORY_KEYWORD_DAMAGED_PRODUCT.d: Created by failed processing; it can be repaired or recycled.
